steps.title: Spot the contrast signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the contrast word But that follows the underlined sentence. It signals that the sentence introduces an idea the passage will then refute.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the answer choices
steps.content:
The result is correct because the underlined sentence introduces a scientific belief that the passage then contradicts.

It states what scientists believed (flat ocean floor), and But signals the shift to what Torres and Chen actually proved.

The other choices wrongly claim the sentence describes experimental design, suggests researcher disagreement, or presents data.

That is the correct answer.
